recommendations.title: The Worst Person in the World
recommendations.overview: The chronicles of four years in the life of Julie, a young woman who navigates the troubled waters of her love life and struggles to find her career path, leading her to take a realistic look at who she really is.

recommendations.title: Thelma
recommendations.overview: A college student starts to experience extreme seizures. She soon learns that the violent episodes are a symptom of inexplicable abilities.

recommendations.title: Reprise
recommendations.overview: Fueled by literary aspirations and youthful exuberance, two competitive friends endure the pangs of love, depression, and burgeoning careers.

recommendations.title: Sentimental Value
recommendations.overview: Sisters Nora and Agnes reunite with their estranged father, the charismatic Gustav, a once-renowned director who offers stage actress Nora a role in what he hopes will be his comeback film. When Nora turns it down, she soon discovers he has given her

recommendations.title: Louder Than Bombs
recommendations.overview: Three years after his wife, acclaimed photographer Isabelle Reed, dies in a car crash, Gene keeps everyday life going with his shy teenage son, Conrad. A planned exhibition of Isabelle’s photographs prompts Gene's older son, Jonah, to return to the h

recommendations.title: A Street Cat Named Bob
recommendations.overview: James Bowen, a homeless busker and recovering drug addict, has his life transformed when he meets a stray ginger cat.

recommendations.title: Yi Yi
recommendations.overview: A Taipei family faces personal and moral uncertainty as everyday events test their relationships and sense of purpose.

recommendations.title: Before Sunset
recommendations.overview: Nine years later, Jesse travels across Europe giving readings from a book he wrote about the night he spent in Vienna with Celine. After his reading in Paris, Celine finds him, and they spend part of the day together before Jesse has to again leave f

recommendations.title: Father and Daughter
recommendations.overview: A father says goodbye to his young daughter. In time the daughter grows old, but within her there is always a deep longing for her father.

recommendations.title: Sound of Metal
recommendations.overview: Metal drummer Ruben begins to lose his hearing. When a doctor tells him his condition will worsen, he thinks his career and life is over. His girlfriend Lou checks the former addict into a rehab for the deaf hoping it will prevent a relapse and help
